title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Urban Company Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Urban Company Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Urban Company Digital Technologies. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Backend Developer to strengthen our Rajkot-based team.

About Urban Company Digital Technologies:
Urban Company Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in MongoDB

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Urban Company Digital Technologies!
